mapper.select: SELECT id, menu_path, status_code, button_name, role_key, visible, created_at, modified_at FROM tb_button_rule ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: MERGE tb_button_rule AS target USING (SELECT #{menuPath} AS menu_path, #{statusCode} AS status_code, #{buttonName} AS button_name, #{roleKey} AS role_key ) AS source ON ( target.menu_path = source.menu_path AND target.status_code = source.status_code AND target.button_name = source.button_name AND target.role_key = source.role_key) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET visible = #{visible}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (menu_path, status_code, button_name, role_key, visible, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{menuPath}, #{statusCode}, #{buttonName}, #{roleKey}, #{visible}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());

INSERT INTO tb_button_rule (menu_path, status_code, button_name, role_key, visible, created_at, modified_at) VALUES
(#{r.menuPath}, #{r.statusCode}, #{r.buttonName}, #{r.roleKey}, #{r.visible}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
